editor.line: Perform 10 iteration of Bisection Method to find the positive root of the equation f(x)=cos(x) which lies between 1 and 2.
stop_err:0$ /*default value should be 0 for 'n' iterations.*/
n:10$ /*this doesn't matter if stop_error is provided.*/
if i=n and stop_err#0 and err>stop_err then n:n+1,
Perform 12 iteration of Bisection Method to find the positive root of the x·exp(x)=1 which lies between 0 and 1.
stop_err:0.0001$ /*default value should be 0 for 'n' iterations.*/
n:12$ /*this doesn't matter if stop_error is provided.*/
if i=n and stop_err#0 and err>stop_err then n:n+1,

mth.t: plot2d: some values will be clipped.

editor.line: Perform 10 iteration of Bisection Method to find the positive root of the cos(x)=3·x−1
stop_err:0$ /*default value should be 0 for 'n' iterations.*/
n:10$ /*this doesn't matter if stop_error is provided.*/
if i=n and stop_err#0 and err>stop_err then n:n+1,

mth.t: plot2d: some values will be clipped.

editor.line: f(x):= x^3+2*x^2-3*x-1; /*Enter given function of x*/
stop_err:0$ /*Stopping error, default value should be 0 if its not to be used and the algorithm will proceed to do "n" number of iterations*/
n:10$ /*Number of iterations, This is ignored if you've specified a stopping error value.*/
p:makelist(1, n)$ /*stores the value of iterations*/
print("Iteration no.", i, "gives x=",p[i]) /*prints the first and second iterations.*/
print("Iteration no.", i, "gives x=",p[i], "with error estimate of", err)), /*prints further iterations along with their error estimate.*/
if (f(a)*f(p[i])>0) then a:p[i] else b:p[i], /*assigns new values to 'a' and 'b' for next iteration.*/
if (i=n and stop_err#0 and err>stop_err) then n:n+1, /*keeps the code running till we hit the stopping error (ignores the value of n).*/
if (err<stop_err or err=0.0) then return("complete, it doesn't converge beyond this.") /*stops the code if the error hits 0 midway through 'n' numbers of iterations and stops the loop.*/
f(x):= x^3+2*x^2-3*x-1; /*Enter given function of x*/
stop_err:0$ /*Stopping error, default value should be 0 if its not to be used and the algorithm will proceed to do "n" number of iterations*/
n:6$ /*Number of iterations, This is ignored if you've specified a stopping error value.*/
graph_assist:true$ /*true : gives a graphical representation of the process(takes time). false : no graphs, just iterations(fast). */
g(x):=((f(b)-f(a))/(b-a))*(x-a)+f(a)$ /*equation of the secant line from f(a) to f(b).*/
p[i]:float(a-(f(a)*(b-a))/(f(b)-f(a))), /*calculates newest iteration and assigns it to "iter#".*/
if graph_assist then (wxplot2d([f(x), x=a , g(x), x=b, x=p[i]], [x, min(a, b, p[i])-0.5, max(a, b, p[i])+0.5], [y, -3.5, 10])), /*gives a graphical representation if "graph_assist" is true.*/
print("Iteration no.", i, "gives x=",p[i]) /*prints the first and second iterations.*/
print("Iteration no.", i, "gives x=",p[i], "with error estimate of", err)), /*prints further iterations along with their error estimate.*/
if (f(a)*f(p[i])>0) then a:p[i] else b:p[i], /*assigns new values to 'a' and 'b' for next iteration.*/
if (i=n and stop_err#0 and err>stop_err) then n:n+1, /*keeps the code running till we hit the stopping error (ignores the value of n).*/
if (err<stop_err or err=0.0) then return("complete, it does'nt converge beyond this.") /*stops the code if the error hits 0 midway through 'n' numbers of iterations and stops the loop.*/

editor.line: Perform 6 iterations of the Secant method to obtain a real root of the following equation f(x) = x^3-5x+1=0 in the interval (0,1).
(for o in [a, b] do (if (f(o)=0) then (s:cons(o, s))),
if length(s)#0 then print("Roots is/are", o))
if (f(p[i-1])-f(p[i-2])=0.0) then return("does not converge beyond this"),
if graph_assist then (wxplot2d([f(x), x=p[i-2] , g(x), x=p[i-1], x=p[i]], [x, min(p[i-1], p[i-2], p[i])-1, max(p[i-1], p[i-2], p[i])+1], [y, -10, 10])),
print("iteration no.", i-2, "gives x=", p[i], "with error estimate of", abs(p[i]-p[i-1])),
if (i=n and stop_err#0 and err>stop_err) then n:n+1,
Perform 6 iterations of the Secant method to obtain a real root of the following equation in the interval(-1,1): f(x) = x^2-1=0.
if graph_assist then (wxplot2d([f(x), x=a , g(x), x=b, x=p[i]], [x, min(a, b, p[i])-1, max(a, b, p[i])+1], [y, -10, 10])),
print("Iteration no.", i, "gives x=",p[i], "with error estimate of", err)),
if (i=n and stop_err#0 and err>stop_err) then n:n+1,
if (f(b)=f(a)) then return("does not converge beyond this"),
print("Iteration no.", i, "gives", c, "with error coefficient of", abs(x1-c)),

editor.line: if graph_assist then (wxplot2d([f(x), x=x1 , g(x), x=c], [x, -0.25, 2.25], [y, -4, 3.5])),
print("Iteration no.", i, "gives", c, "with error coefficient of", abs(x1-c)),
Perform 6 iterations of Newton Raphson Method to find out the smallest positive root of the following equation starting with approximation x=0.4
print("Iteration no.", i, "gives", c, "with error coefficient of", abs(x1-c)),

editor.line: print("Iteration", i-1 ,"-> x1=",x1," x2=", x2," x3=", x3, " with avg error of", err),
if (((abs(ev(lhs(s1)-rhs(s1))) +abs(ev(lhs(s2)-rhs(s2))) + abs(ev(lhs(s3)-rhs(s3))))/3)>err) then return("The system of equations doesn't converge beyond this")
print("Iteration", i-1 ,"-> x1=",x1," x2=", x2," x3=", x3, " with avg error of", err),
if (((abs(ev(lhs(s1)-rhs(s1))) +abs(ev(lhs(s2)-rhs(s2))) + abs(ev(lhs(s3)-rhs(s3))))/3)>err) then return("The system of equations doesn't converge beyond this")
print("Iteration", i ,"-> x1=",x1," x2=", x2," x3=", x3, " with avg error of", err),
if (((abs(ev(lhs(s1)-rhs(s1))) +abs(ev(lhs(s2)-rhs(s2))) + abs(ev(lhs(s3)-rhs(s3))))/3)>err) then return("The system of equations doesn't converge beyond this")
wxplot2d([f(x), [discrete, xlist, ylist]], [x, lmin(xlist)-1, lmax(xlist)+1], [style,lines, points], [point_type, box]);
wxplot2d([f(x), [discrete, xlist, ylist]], [x, lmin(xlist)-1, lmax(xlist)+1], [style,lines, points], [point_type, box]);
wxplot2d([f(x), [discrete, xlist, ylist]], [x, lmin(xlist)-1, lmax(xlist)+1], [style,lines, points], [point_type, box]);
g(a, b):= if a+1=b then block( ev((Y[b]-Y[a])/(X[b]-X[a])) )
for i:1 thru n-1 do (c:makelist(g(a, a+i), a, n-i), for s:1 thru i do(c:endcons("-", c)), Dd:addrow(Dd, c))$
wxplot2d([f(x), [discrete, X, Y]], [x, lmin(X)-1, lmax(X)+1], [style,lines, points], [point_type, box]);
g(a, b):= if a+1=b then block( ev((Y[b]-Y[a])/(X[b]-X[a])) )
for i:1 thru n-1 do (c:makelist(g(a, a+i), a, n-i), for s:1 thru i do(c:endcons("-", c)), Dd:addrow(Dd, c))$
wxplot2d([f(x), [discrete, X, Y]], [x, lmin(X)-1, lmax(X)+1], [style,lines, points], [point_type, box]);
g(a, b):= if a+1=b then block( ev((Y[b]-Y[a])/(X[b]-X[a])) )
for i:1 thru n-1 do (c:makelist(g(a, a+i), a, n-i), for s:1 thru i do(c:endcons("-", c)), Dd:addrow(Dd, c))$
wxplot2d([f(x), [discrete, X, Y]], [x, lmin(X)-1, lmax(X)+1], [style,lines, points], [point_type, box]);
g(a, b):= if a+1=b then block( ev((Y[b]-Y[a])/(X[b]-X[a])) )
wxplot2d([f(x), [discrete, X, Y]], [x, lmin(X)-1, lmax(X)+1], [style,lines, points], [point_type, box]);
g(a, b):= if a+1=b then block( ev((Y[b]-Y[a])/(X[b]-X[a])) )
wxplot2d([f(x), [discrete, X, Y]], [x, lmin(X)-1, lmax(X)+1], [style,lines, points], [point_type, box]);
/*in case they also ask for the exact value of the integral in the question*/
(y_val:[y1], h:del_x*((p-x1)/abs(p-x1)), x_val:makelist(a, a, x1, p, h))
else (print("function at x=", p, "is y=", c),
(y_val:[y1], h:del_x*((p-x1)/abs(p-x1)), x_val:makelist(a, a, x1, p, h))
else (print("function at x=", p, "is y=", c),
(y_val:[y1], h:del_x*((p-x1)/abs(p-x1)), x_val:makelist(a, a, x1, p, h))
else (print("function at x=", p, "is y=", c),
for i:1 thru n+1 do print(concat(x, i), "=", X[i], "->", concat(y, i), "=", Y[i]);
(Y:[y1], h:del_x*((p-x1)/abs(p-x1)), X:makelist(a, a, x1, p, h))
